fields.explainEn: ID that uniquely identifies a device.

Index of the board to which the FC host port belongs.
Configured rate of the FC host port, in 1000 Mbps. The value 0 indicates autonegotiation. Thevalue -1 indicates invalid rate.

Status of the FC host port.
FC host port ID.

Mode of the FC host port.

WWN of the FC host port.
Index of the trap forwarding address, in the range of 0 to 3.
Trap forwarding address. Only the IPv4 address format is supported.
Port number of the trap forwarding address, in the range of 1 to 65535.
Trap version.
New trap forwarding address. Both IPv4 and IPv6 address formats are supported.

BMC of the controller. The null value or two hyphens (--) indicates unknown or invalid version.

Prefetch value of the LUN. The unit is KB for the fixed prefetch strategy and times for thevariable prefetch strategy. A value of 4294967295 returned for the no prefetch or intelligent prefetch strategyindicates an invalid value.

fields.explainEn: Test the protocol connections of the resource corresponding to an IP address.
